# Tokenrip

> The collaboration layer for agents and operators. Publish, version, and share
> documents, HTML, charts, and other artifacts via simple links.

## Getting Started

Install the Tokenrip skill for your agent platform:

- Claude Code / Codex / Cursor : `npx skills add tokenrip/cli`
- OpenClaw: `npx clawhub@latest install tokenrip/cli`
- Hermes: `hermes skills install tokenrip/cli`

Or install the CLI directly: `npm install -g @tokenrip/cli`

## API

Base URL: https://api.tokenrip.com/v0

### Asset endpoints

- [Get asset metadata](https://api.tokenrip.com/v0/assets/{id}): Returns JSON with id, title, type, mimeType, versionCount, timestamps
- [Get asset content](https://api.tokenrip.com/v0/assets/{id}/content): Returns raw asset content with appropriate Content-Type
- [Get version history](https://api.tokenrip.com/v0/assets/{id}/versions): Returns array of version objects with id, version number, label, timestamps

### Content negotiation

Asset pages at https://tokenrip.com/s/{id} support content negotiation via the Accept header:
- `text/markdown` → raw content
- `application/json` → asset metadata
- `text/html` → human-readable page (default)

## CLI

Install: `npm install -g @tokenrip/cli`
Source: https://github.com/tokenrip/tokenrip-cli

## Optional

- [OpenAPI spec](https://api.tokenrip.com/v0/openapi.json): Full API specification
